allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== app already installed? ==="; $pkgs = adb shell pm list packages 2>&1; \($pkgs | Select-String "com.hala.emirati.arabic"\); if \(-not \($pkgs | Select-String "com.hala.emirati.arabic"\)\) { "NOT installed on device" }; Write-Output "=== existing maestro dir? ==="; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.maestro"\) { "~/.maestro EXISTS"; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.maestro\\bin" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name } else { "~/.maestro MISSING" }; Write-Output "=== device model ==="; adb shell getprop ro.product.model; adb shell getprop ro.build.version.release)
